name: delivery
description: Runs the delivery pipeline exclusively: aPRD → roadmap → ADR → HLD → build
_scope_note: Generic orchestrator (installed copy of _orchestrator.generic.md). Lean context: resources load steering only; role prompts lazy-loaded from .kiro/adp/prompts/<NN-phase>/<ROLE>.md per step. Each step delegates to fresh `step` subagent. WORKSPACE_ROOT + DELIVERABLE_TARGET = launcher params (operator repo root + chosen canon profile under .kiro/adp/code-canon/), never pinned. All 5 phases run LIVE.
